feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Supply Chain Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Supply Chain Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Isle of Man (IM country code) country needs to be sent as GB in documentation for Dutch Customs
entry.content: I have a requirement for Dutch customs for shipments coming from Isle of Man (country code IM) to come across with country code GB. I thought maybe somewhere on the country setup there would be a place to put this type of alternate country code that I could then just refer to and pull for documentation sent to Dutch customs but I am not seeing anything. Is there any suggestions or guidance for this type of issue - I know of at least 3 country codes (I believe they are called British Crown Dependencies) where the actual code is one thing but at least Dutch customs requires GB instead. Thanks!

entry.title: How to change the Procurement Type from "Reservation for Network" to "Purchase Requisition for Netw"
entry.content:
Hello everyone, good day.

I would just like to ask how can I have the Procurement Type from "Reservation for Network" to "Purchase Requisition for Network"? I am trying to create a PR using CJ20N. I put the material and Item Cat "L" for non stock

But it automatically populates the Procurement Type to "Reservation for Network" with this I cannot copy the PR to make it to PO since there is no PR.

Can anyone help me to solve this?

PS. Upon entering the material and the item cat I got a pop-up notification that the material is Phantom Assembly. I just click the yes and continue.

entry.title: Had http 404 error on IBP supply chain topics for last week. It was working 2 weeks back.
entry.content: Had http 404 error on IBP supply chain topics for last week. It was working 2 weeks back. @supply chain

entry.title: absolete problem
entry.content:
mb01 is absolete problem. what is this?
I dont have any idea about this..

entry.title: ABAP code of Advanced Return Management
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm testing ARM process and have a question about posting change.


Here is a test return delivery, as you can see, two outbound deliveries (posting change in warehouse) will be generated.
If I understand correctly, the first outbound delivery generates a posting change document in warehouse and then triggers goods movment.
Afterwards, the second outbound delivery is created, my question is how it is created? Maybe someone could show the ABAP code here.

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: Auto Deleted Line Items of PR
entry.content:
Hello.

I have 3 PRs that has been marked for deletion. Also, the deletion of line item in PR was not reflected in Item Changes, the only change that was reflected is that when I undeleted the PR.

May I know how to resolve this issue? or what is the cause of this issue?

Thank you so much.

~B

entry.title: SAP IBP - Job launch suggestion
entry.content:
Hello, greetings from Ecuador!

I would like to make a suggestion, please consider adding the feature "Notification after finishing job" vía a registered SMS or vía email.

SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain 

 

Thank you!

Gerardo.

entry.title: Collective T-code for visualize "Pedimento" number used per material and batch.
entry.content:
Hi Team:

I would like to know in which collective T-code que can visualize the "pedimento" number used for a list of batches (material numbers) received.

Thank you.

entry.title: ABAP RUNTIME ERROR WHEN RUNNING THE ME2J report
entry.content:
Hi 

Could anyone please help to provide solutions / suggestions on the ABAP runtime error when I run the ME2J report.

I would like to get the export of all PO issued for the proejct and the application terminates due to an ABAP runtime error.

Thanks very much.

entry.title: T CODE SHOWING MATERIAL AN HS CODE
entry.content: I am looking for a TCODE that if i input multiple material codes would show me the HS code also. I am aware of MM03 however is there any others?

entry.title: SAP S/4 Hana SD Advanced Returns Management
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone please help on this.

This issue related to Advanced Returns Management, i have created one return order under return delivery  with single line item for 5 quantity, Post warehouse process i am using TCODE MSR_INSPWH to inspect the material, here i was trying to SPLIT the quantity as 3 & 2 respectively in ITEM TAB by using Create SPLIT ITEM ICON, i was getting error as no stock item could be determined for inspection.

Please find the below Screen shots.

entry.title: how to customize batch quantities on handling units in RF environment
entry.content:
Hello experts

unfortunately I have problems with mix HU in inbound processes. I would like to post goods receipt of batch managed material with different batch numbers all on one HU. 

How do I customize that there could be different batch numbers within one HU.

Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Unable to open note 2254129 in IBP promotion related documentation
entry.content:
Tag: SAP Integrated Business Planning(IBP) - Promotinal Planning
Unable to open below link: (Error it just keep in hanging state)
https://help.sap.com/docs/link-disclaimer?site=https://me.sap.com/notes/2254129
Link mentioned in below document:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/feae3cea3cc549aaa9d9de7d363a83e6/66be40564b9ff81ae10000000a441470.html?q=SAP%20IBP%20promotional%20planning
Please help.

entry.title: Renaming of independent requirement plan MD61/62 e.g. from MarketA1 to MarketC7
entry.content:
all,

we use requirment plans to link customer and sales to it,

Now ownership changes and I want to amend requirement plan accordlingly.

How can I rename existing plans without delete and set up new?

Appreciate your support

entry.title: Hello Experts I am on BYD and I have a Production order I need to cancel
entry.content:
I have a Production BOM that is for output quantity 1 but the user meant to put 1X in the production model they produce the 1x this leads to the production task for supply to multiply the quantities and end up with the wrong confirmations.

the make task has already been finished and confirmed hence I am unable to cancel the production order.

I am also unable to confirm different quantities on the task.

Your thoughts on how you would go about this is highly appreciated.

entry.title: customer account for collect
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an urgent issue where a customer account number for collect is being copied when I enter sold-to-party in sales order with pop-up. But i am dont know from where this number is coming from. i have checked with vcust and in customer master but i couldn't find it. This number is used against billing with customer.

this number is copied to text field in header but customer is deleting the field and saving sales order so company can provide free firght, but still this field is copied to delivery. when i tried to make changes in text determination, the pop-up itself not comming. Please help me on this.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: DELIVERY SCHEDULE TARGET QUANTITY AND DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES
entry.content: DELIVERY SCHEDULE TARGET QUANTITY AND DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES Objective : On certain contracts, our supplies are linked to contractual quantities which extend over several years. The system should help us generate purchase requisitions and not delivery times when all target quantities are achieved as per delivery schedules. But that is not the case today. Here is an example in test base Item: 143000340 Supplier: x Open order: 440133 Extension: 2710 Test #1 DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES modified at the end of 2024 Target quantity adjusted to the end of 2024 with delivered history + upcoming delivery until the end of 2024  Target quantity in open order: 1792 CT We launch the Net Need Calculation via MD41 and it works: the system generates a Purchase Request after 2024. But it is the DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES that does the work and not the targeted quantities. See below. Test #2 The SOURCE DIRECTORY provisioning was changed immediately to see how the system reacts. We do not change the target quantity. Here, the system generates delivery times in 2025 and does not take into account the target quantity. Test #3 We go back to where we started and do the opposite. We are setting the end of validity of the SOURCE DIRECTORY offer at 2024 and we are not setting any quantitative objective. The net requirement calculation works and the system generates the purchase request. Conclusion: it is the SOURCE DIRECTORY of supply which controls and we would like to be able to control by the target quantity as well, please inform me of the customization to be made

entry.title: /scwm/adgi - Post GI - API or FM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In SAP EWM 2022 (on-premise system), I'm developing an custom Unmanaged RAP API to automate unplanned goods issue (GI) posting. Currently, manual posting involves entering the following details:

Tcode: /n/scwm/adgi

Selection screen values:

1) Warehouse Number

2) Product

3) Storage Bin

4) GI Process: Consumption

5) unchecked checkbox: Select Scrap Stock only

Execute and Select Physical stock and pressed Post GI. 

Messages appears: Warehouse task created. 

On Refreshing, entry Disappears. 

Question:

While creating Post GI, tried checking following FM Calls. None of these FM's got triggered. 

/SCWM/STOCK_CHANGE
/SCWM/GM_POST
/SCWM/TO_CREATE

Please help with FM or standard API which will help in automating Post GI Process in SAP EWM 2022 onprem. 

Note: 

I have already checked following standard documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/d6f87c227f894ba1b2c0d697189b73c4.html

https://api.sap.com/api/OP_WHSEPHYSICALSTOCKPRODUCTS_0001/overview?ReleaseInfo=2022%20FPS02

 

Regards,

Nikhil1

entry.title: Retail: physical inventory with MDE
entry.content:
Hello,

I've got a case in a retail industry considering inventory done with MDEs, as follows:

1. Office clerk should freeze the inventory - Fiori app F4550 (schedule mass PI creation) works well, PI are created, upcoming count is visible in IKPF.

2. Store staff should perform the physical inventory by scanning the goods with an MDE (Honeywell, Zebra, mobile phone) using some Fiori app - which app?

Remarks:

* the app should enable scanning the goods in random order, i.e. user is not supposed to select one PI and scan products, then next PI and scan the products; expectation is that a user goes to a rack full of different clothes or accessories, scans their barcodes in random order, then proceeds with next rack, etc. until all products in a store are scanned;

* the app should enable scanning, downloading the count (e.g. after connecting it to a laptop), managing scanned items (e.g. if user scans the wrong barcode), and eventually to transfer the whole count (can be done by several MDEs) into a WVINVE IDoc. Minimal value: downloading the count into an Excel file which could be later uploaded (via dedicated interface) into mentioned IDoc.

Is there any such app? From what I've checked, Manage Physical Inventory Count or MI09 would be closest, but even they would require some adjustments.

entry.title: MRP RUN CLARIFICATION
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Need one clarification on the SAP MRP RUN.

While MRP RUNS, during the MRP run some GR postings happening. in that case how SAP system behaves.

Detailed Answer Highly Appreciated...!

 

Regards,

Sedhupathy K
